ab: Niqan kingal tnhiyan mu matas hangan na o Yakaw, smhungi bi madas qaya kdjiyax.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Yakaw，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Yakaw, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Matas bi siida, kmsiyuk ppatas, ssrus aji o ptasun patas tnhiyan na.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Empxal, mndha, mntru, pksiyuk bi qaya hyaan kana.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Kiya ni niqan kingal naqih lnhayan na. Kmsiyuk qaya do ini bgay.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Hici bi do ini pksiyuk qaya hyaan kana da.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Niqan kingal jiyax, musa nami msupu mrrawa ngangut.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: muda elug kmusa bi ngangut ka Yakaw, kiya ni smhungi madas lblak ssrus.
ch: 路途中，Yakaw想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Yakaw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: mksiyuk tnhiyan na lblak ssrus, kiya ni smiyuk hyaan kana ini ku adas yaku uri msa smiyuk rmngaw.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Mtbiyax bi ka Yakaw ni lmingis da. Msaang rmngaw, hmuya ma namu ini pksiyuk lblak ssrus knan!
ch: Yakaw急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Yakaw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: Smiyuk hyaan ka tnhiyan na. Yasa ini su bi adas nanak ka isu, duri ni knsyukan su ka qaya o ini su bqaani!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Saw saman musa ptasan, mgrbu bi dhuq ptasan ka Yakaw. Ngali na ka knsyukan na tnhiyan na ka qyqaya o bqaani na tnhiyan na kana.
ch: 隔天上學，Yakaw很早就到學校了，Yakaw把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Yakaw arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Psruwa tnhiyan na ka Yakaw ni rmngaw, babaw na do ida ku bi meadas qaya mu nanak, mhuway namu balay brah na o smruwa namu pksiyuk qaya hyaan uri.
ch: Yakaw向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Yakaw apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
